jd_text: Head of Pricing - Dubai (Onsite) We are currently partnering with a fast-growing, digitally native fashion group to appoint a Head of Pricing based in Dubai. This is a high-impact leadership role, responsible for shaping and driving pricing strategy across a portfolio of global fashion brands operating in highly competitive, fast-paced markets. The business operates at a significant scale, reaching millions of customers worldwide through a mix of direct-to-consumer and marketplace channels. As they continue to expand, pricing is becoming a critical lever for profitability, growth and competitive positioning. The Opportunity This role will lead the evolution of pricing from a traditional cost-based approach to a highly strategic, data-led function. You will own pricing strategy across multiple brands and regions, driving margin optimisation, improving sell-through, and enabling smarter commercial decisions. Key Responsibilities Define and implement a multi-brand pricing strategy aligned with commercial objectives and brand positioning Develop and optimise pricing models, including dynamic pricing, elasticity testing and market-based approaches Establish pricing frameworks, ladders and guardrails to ensure consistency and competitiveness Drive pricing and discounting decisions based on performance data, inventory and trading dynamics Monitor and analyse key metrics such as margin, discount depth, competitiveness and conversion Lead scenario planning, pricing experiments and commercial analysis Build and implement governance, approval processes and pricing best practices Partner closely with Trading, Merchandising, Finance and Marketing teams Present insights and recommendations to senior leadership What We’re Looking For 5 to 6 years of experience in pricing within fashion, retail or e-commerce Strong commercial acumen with a deep understanding of margins, pricing strategy and customer perception Advanced analytical skills, particularly in Excel (experience with BI tools or SQL/Python is advantageous) Proven ability to influence stakeholders and operate at a strategic level Experience working across multiple brands or markets is highly desirable Exposure to automation, AI or predictive pricing tools is a plus
